visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged man, the host, wearing a grey flat cap and a grey blazer over a white t-shirt. He stands before a vibrant red textured wall featuring the large white text HERMÈS IN THE MAKING. He gestures enthusiastically with both hands as he addresses the camera in a medium shot. (2) The camera pans to a large tan leather Kelly bag secured in a minimalist glass display case. The background is a red grid structure. Additional shots display a collection of luxury handbags in diverse colors like pink, yellow, and white, some made of wicker and others of smooth leather, arranged on well-lit shelves. (3) A craftswoman wearing glasses and a dark apron is seen in a close-up, meticulously working on a piece of blue leather with a handheld tool. This is followed by a shot of hands demonstrating the five distinct layers of high-quality leather and padding that form a Kelly bag handle against a red grid background. (4) In the silk department, large square scarves with intricate patterns are displayed in rotating yellow circular frames. A man in a white professional lab coat is shown performing manual screen-printing, pressing ink through a mesh onto a large white silk sheet on a long table in a studio environment. (5) The host interacts with a large digital kiosk featuring a complex illustration of a city with a dragon-like creature. As he presses colorful physical buttons on the console, the digital artwork dynamically fills with bright colors, showcasing the interactive nature of the exhibit. (6) A vast array of leather swatches in different hues is displayed on a metal rack. Nearby, a man explains glove-making patterns on a red board. A ceramic plate featuring a blue leopard is shown, followed by a craftswoman hand-painting a large, detailed ceramic bowl with fine brushes. (7) The host demonstrates a large wooden musical box mechanism painted bright yellow, which is operated by levers. He then transitions to sitting on a bright yellow leather saddle mounted on a post. Other visitors are visible in the background of the large, industrial-style exhibition hall. (8) The host concludes by sitting on the yellow saddle and speaking directly to the camera. He wears a beaded bracelet and gestures to emphasize his points. The environment is bright and spacious, with industrial ceilings and various exhibit structures visible in the depth of the scene.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥 [Logo]: @3ctim. (2) [Slogan]: HERMÈS IN THE MAKING. (3) [Subtitle]: 來看一下愛馬仕匠心工坊. (4) [Subtitle]: 台灣是第14站. (5) [Subtitle]: 皮革製作-Kelly包. (6) [Subtitle]: Kelly包的手把總共有五層. (7) [Subtitle]: 由40個基本色發展出7萬5000個愛馬仕獨有色彩. (8) [Subtitle]: 每一款絲巾有6-8種顏色版本. (9) [Subtitle]: 絲巾印染. (10) [Subtitle]: 手套製作. (11) [Subtitle]: 瓷器彩繪. (12) [Subtitle]: 用製作馬鞍的工具製作而成的大型音樂盒. (13) [Subtitle]: 馬鞍製作.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, 3 craftsmen, approximately 4 other staff and visitors visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, a grey blazer, white t-shirt, light blue jeans, and sneakers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An industrial-style exhibition hall with high ceilings, red grid wall displays, wooden tables for craftsmen, interactive digital kiosks, and various luxury product displays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with an energetic male voice speaking Traditional Chinese at a moderate to fast rate. The voice is clear and authoritative. A high-tempo pop/electronic BGM with a strong, driving beat and synthesizer layers accompanies the speech from the start. (2) A digital whoosh sound effect triggers a visual and acoustic transition. The host's narration continues with high arousal and positive valence. Ambient environmental noise, such as distant chatter and footsteps characteristic of an exhibition hall, is faintly layered beneath the music and vocals. (3) As the host interacts with a large musical box, a series of clear, metallic, and percussive melodic notes are heard around the 57-second mark. These sounds are well-recorded and distinct from the background music. The speech-to-music loudness ratio remains balanced throughout the recording. (4) The host summarizes his experience with a calm yet enthusiastic tone. The BGM remains continuous without structural pauses. The recording has high fidelity and sounds like it was captured in a controlled yet open environment. The mix is professionally balanced with clear vocal articulation until the fade out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sequence of Exhibits -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and showcase the 'Hermès in the Making' exhibition, emphasizing the brand's heritage and the detailed craftsmanship involved in their products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of the Hermès exhibition, products, and craftsmanship with the brand name featured prominently.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-production-value promotional vlog that uses rapid editing and energetic narration to keep viewers engaged while highlighting luxury craftsmanship.
